claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Improved DinoBrain against OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS without claiming full OS completion. Added a public-data safety verifier that scans the real data vault, reconciles GitHub visibility with docs, detects raw transcript/secret/local-only markers, verifies default-index exclusions, and writes public-data safety reports. Reconciled docs away from private-only data repo assumptions. Added a reusable RAG source-anchor seeding command and seeded user-provided RAG methodology anchors as anchor_only_unverified source/provenance candidates, plus a RAG Methodology Anchor Catalog. Rebuilt Wiki/SQLite indexes and graph health; verified RAG anchors are searchable through SQLite-backed wiki_search. Build, check, and verify:v2 passed. Current graph health and public-data safety remain degraded, not complete.
